name: Derek G.
title: Microsoft AI & Power Platform Developer | Copilot Studio, Power Apps, Power Automate
_comment: Keyword tiers drive the 'fit' score. Edit freely to retune. Keys are matched case-insensitively against the job title, skills, and description. A title match counts more than a description match (see score.py).
_intersection_comment: Added to fit when a job names BOTH a Microsoft product AND AI/agent/copilot/claude work — Derek's differentiated sweet spot.
_eligibility_comment: Jobs requiring residency in these countries are flagged ineligible (Derek is US-based). 'US/U.S.-based' requirements are treated as eligible-plus.
